caption:
💃 The lecture hall was silent, save for the low hum of projector fans, but my heart was pounding like a drum solo. I adjusted my fitted silk blouse, feeling the cool fabric cling to my curves as I took my place behind the podium. My students, mostly fresh-faced undergrads, were scribbling furiously in their notebooks, unaware that the woman teaching them advanced thermodynamics was anything but ordinary. I leaned forward slightly, letting a strand of hair fall over my shoulder, my eyes scanning the room with a mix of authority and allure. "Remember," I murmured, my voice dropping an octave, "heat transfers faster when the barrier between us is removed." A few students chuckled nervously, glancing up, their eyes lingering on the way my blouse strained against my chest. I smiled knowingly, feeling the heat rise in my cheeks, and stepped closer to the whiteboard, my hips swaying in a way that sent a ripple of curiosity through the class. As the final bell rang, I turned, letting my hair cascade over one shoulder, and watched as they slowly filed out, their eyes following every move I made. Tonight, after I'd packed my bag, I knew exactly where I was headed—the university's rooftop lounge, where the skyline of Berlin twinkled against the summer sky, and I could be whoever I wanted to be. 🌃✨

#TeacherDiaries #BerlinNights #UniversitySecrets #SilkAndScience #RomanticTension #OfficeHours #CurvesInClass #EveningVibes #SmartAndSexy #EuropeanSummer
